name: Makeup Run Challenge
description: Run, collect, and style in the Makeup Run Challenge! Help girls complete their makeover by picking up makeup items, accessories, and fashion upgrades while racing through fun obstacle tracks. Test your speed, reflexes, and fashion sense as you dodge obstacles and finish the run with a perfect look. Play this exciting princess, fashion, dress-up, makeup, makeover, running, fun, girls’ game, and enjoy colorful levels filled with surprises. Become the ultimate fashion star by completing the makeover and crossing the finish line in style!
instructions: Tap Left Mouse Click or Swipe amp Hold
